    labelAn Unknown Threat: Part 17 (0-0)
    titleAn Unknown Threat: Part 17
    majorTypestatic
    nextMissionQxi_yqotjEWA1a89UTWk6Q
    drops6XA_1jdt0qinab-duSurA
    keyuwTjWPOcEkC63Gn3dcU5Nw
    descriptionLand on Roskur in Mitrilion and search for the Renegade Defector. Crew: “This planet seems to be very heavily defended! We may need some assistance here”
    mustBeInorderNo
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionRenegade Defector: “Who are you? How did you even find me here? I’m actually very impressed… I’m living in a small container in the middle of giant forest on a heavily defended alien planet in the middle of the insect infested Gellan sector… I thought people would take a hint that I maybe didn’t want to be found. So what do you want? You want information about the Nezerians? Sure… I’ll come with you, since you are going to have to find me a new hiding place, the Renegades don’t take very kindly to defectors.”
    addedBodies["cpChTzw2rUqj2V7JfZZknw"]
    tableMissionTypes
    availableYes
    typetransport
    maxLvl0
